resources.string: Click the back button again to exit the app!
Failed to obtain permission, which may cause some functions to fail to work normally. Please go to the application permission setting page for manual authorization
Initialization failed, please exit and try again
The network is abnormal, please check your network or contact the developer
Parse json error, please exit and try again
Download error, please exit and try again
Internal error, please contact the developer
The gates to a new world are about to open
Enemy forces will arrive in 30 seconds
Mom said, Nobody can eat hot tofu in a hurry
